name: oracle_spatial_agent
description: Spatial hotspot specialist for Oracle inventory risk workflows. It renders a PNG map from warehouse hotspot data, highlighting the primary pressure point and suggested relief route.

skills.name: spatial-hotspot-renderer
skills.description: Specialist in Oracle spatial hotspot visualizations for warehouse and inventory pressure.

skills.name: renderHotspotMap
skills.description: Render a PNG hotspot map for a product such as SKU-500, using Oracle-backed warehouse risk data when available.
